title: Mexican Flatbread Nachos
description: A twist on traditional nachos using crispy flatbread and topped with creamy pickled jalapeños.
instructions: Cut the flatbread into triangles or use as is.
Arrange the flatbread on a baking sheet.
Bake for 8-10 minutes or until crispy.
While the flatbread is baking, mix the crumbled feta cheese with bread crumbs and chopped cilantro.
Once the flatbread is crispy, remove from the oven and top with the feta cheese mixture.
Follow with a layer of sliced pickled jalapeños, sour cream, and salsa.
Finish with shredded cheese and return to the oven for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
